bridge.name: FunctorialBridge
bridge.definition: UGMT-to-GUIT operational projection and GUIT-to-UGMT_partial inverse lift

formal.commutative_hint: Pi_int o Lift_math ~= Id_GUIT on operationally admissible layers

verdict.core_answer: UGMT and GUIT now admit a functorial-style bridge: GUIT can be treated as the operational projection of UGMT, while UGMT can be partially reconstructed from GUIT plus gauge-removal and unique-theta witnesses.
